days.text: Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers. Force 3 to 5 east to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Showers will become more frequent later.A few thunderstorms later. Force 4 to 5 east to southeasterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southeasterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
